arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Tottenham Carabao Cup semi-final second leg simulated to predict cup fate
arts.sum: Lucas Bergvall scored the only goal of the game as Spurs beat Liverpool 1-0 in the first leg, meaning the Lilywhites take their narrow lead into the second leg at Anfield later today. Tottenham have the chance to reach their first cup final since 2021 later today as Ange Postecoglou's side take on Liverpool in the second leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final tie.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Tottenham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool host Tottenham Hotspur in the second leg of their Carabao Cup semi-final tie this evening. Arne Slot’s side are a goal down from the first meeting in North London and looking to achieve another Anfield comeback tonight.
